violations.text: Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (beverages/deli meat) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
An accumulation of debris was observed near the dumpster area. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
